name: Seafood Chowder
recipeIngredient: 4 1/2 oz can shrimp, drained and rinsed
4 1/2 oz can crab meat, drained and rinsed
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the onion, carrots, bell pepper, and celery finely using a metal blade of food processor.
2. In a saucepan, combine all ingredients.
3. Bring to boil and simmer for 30 minutes or until flavors are blended.
